title: Technical Scoping: How Shipping API Dojo v2 Designed Its Content-Family Foundation
summary: Before building Shipping API Dojo v2, we needed a complete technical blueprint. Here's how we scoped content families, seeded randomization, auth/billing/email/domain strategy, and the decisions that shaped the architecture.
body: # Technical Scoping: How Shipping API Dojo v2 Designed Its Content-Family Foundation
heroImageAlt: A technical blueprint document showing content-family data models, seeded randomization strategy, and the auth/billing/email/domain architecture stack
author: Nicolas Brulay
